caption: CASE STUDY 011 | Deep sea as dessert. Coral, sponge, and shell confectionaries rendered in matcha, castella, and mochi. Traditional forms and a flavors pushed somewhere a little stranger. Made in Fuser.

caption: Collaboration comes in many different forms. 🐏Introducing the Fuser Community Partner Program—built for creatives who move between disciplines, bring people into conversation, and share their process as naturally as they share their work.Learn more and apply at fuser.studio/partners.

comments.author: socialsoftware_
comments.text: Scores for Social SoftwarePerformances and Closing Event!Saturday, June 13th 12–2pm@ Fuser, 1811 Blake Ave, Los AngelesLight bites provided.Celebrate the closing of Social Software Cycle 2 with us. We invite you to join us for final performances and presentations by the cohort members. RSVP at the link in bio.Over the last ten weeks, SoSoft cohort members have developed projects that reinterpret “scores for social software.”Jordan Silver — Sonic ArchitectureEm Lugo — Ambling Los AngelesÆther Cavendish — Vigil ScoreThomas Noya — BiophoníaMavyn Vu — the radio is an altar : portal Alex Espinosa — Music for World ComputersJeffrey Alan Scudder — Aesthetic.ComputerDarlyn Phan — MeridiansChelly Jin — Software as a ChoreographyBanyi Huang — Conjuring Notness

caption: Testing Shapes and Patterns with Recraft V4 Text-to-Vector generation.Did you know you can use SVGS in the Compositor Node? Fully editable vectors can be connected, layered, grouped, and scaled. Try it at fuser.studio
author: fuserstudio

caption: New in Fuser 🐎Split Layers: Separate single image layers into editable cutouts. Each one can be moved, masked, transformed, or split further.Group layers: move, transform, and control multiple layers at once — each one still editable on its own.Try it now at fuser.studio
author: fuserstudio

caption: New in Fuser: Right click any video to save specific frames. Use them to extend a clip, create a loop, or screen grab the moment you want.Try it now at fuser.studio

comments.author: newinc
comments.text: Design and print your own keychain with Fuser (@fuserstudio) at DEMO2026 Power Lunch: Prompt to Pocket.This hands-on workshop walks you through Fuser, an AI-generated 3D design tool. Join workshop lead Jillian Leedy (@jillianleedy) to prompt, iterate and prep a custom object.Designs will be printed in NEW INC’s fabrication lab. Leave with a custom designed keychain in your pocket. No design experience, coding, or CAD skills required.⏺️ Get a single-day ticket for June 3 or a Festival Pass to participate in this workshop. Sign up is required with limited capacity. Visit demofestival.org to learn more.

caption: Sketch to film grain in a few nodes. Drop in your image, run it through the film filter built with the Creative Code node, and generate video. Swap between looks or write your own from scratch - test it out with our Film Filter Template!
author: fuserstudio

caption: Don’t just search for the perfect texture — create it. Generate seamless textures from any image, directly in Fuser.fuser.studio
